# Aerocast

Aerocast is a live weather and travel-intelligence dashboard for professionals and travelers.

## Core capabilities

- Live current, hourly, and 7-day weather from Open-Meteo
- Air-quality and astronomy context
- Interactive Google Maps centered on the selected city
- Weather-aware itinerary and workspace planning
- Aerocast AI Hub for conversational weather guidance

## Data policy

Weather values shown in the dashboard come from the live Open-Meteo forecast and air-quality APIs. Aerocast does not substitute fabricated weather when the provider is unavailable.
